heading: Counterclaims
label: 1607 Counterclaims
notes: Effective Date of 2008 AmendmentFor applicability of amendments by to pending cases, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 110–181section 1083(c) of Pub. L. 110–181section 1605A of this title
Effective DateSection effective 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 21, 1976section 8 of Pub. L. 94–583section 1602 of this title
amendments: Effective Date of 2008 AmendmentFor applicability of amendments by to pending cases, see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 110–181section 1083(c) of Pub. L. 110–181section 1605A of this title

children.label: a
children.text: for which a foreign state would not be entitled to immunity under section 1605 or 1605A of this chapter had such claim been brought in a separate action against the foreign state; or

children.label: b
children.text: arising out of the transaction or occurrence that is the subject matter of the claim of the foreign state; or

children.label: c
children.text: to the extent that the counterclaim does not seek relief exceeding in amount or differing in kind from that sought by the foreign state.
